title: SignedAuthorization
description: Cryptographically signed authorisation wrapper produced by the server for the Partial A flow (profiles/offline/ble-handshake.md §4.2). Sibling shape to the receipt wrapper (common/receipt.schema.json): the signed body is the canonical claim set defined by server-signed-auth-claims.schema.json; the signature is ECDSA P-256-SHA256 over the canonical bytes per §4.2.1.

data.description: Base64-encoded OSPP Canonical Form (spec/06-security.md §4.8) of the canonical ServerSignedAuthClaims body — see server-signed-auth-claims.schema.json (10 required claims). Signed by the server's ECDSA P-256 private key over the canonical bytes directly per §4.2.1 (NOT over the base64 form).
